game: Guilty Gear XX Accent Core Plus R

movesList.name: Force Roman Cancel (FRC)
inputs: Any 3 attack buttons during specific blue flashing move windows (Costs 25% Tension)

movesList.name: Slashback
inputs: S+HS (Just defend parry, reduces blockstun significantly)

movesList.name: Force Break
inputs: Specific special moves using the D button (Costs 25% Tension)
